professor.title: 副教授
professor.biography_text: Jianwu Li received the B.S., M.Eng. and Ph.D. degrees from Tianjin University, China, in 1997, 2000 and 2003, respectively. He visited Columbia University as a visiting scholar from 2013, 11 to 2014, 11.
